product: Expanded feature support for FIPS-Compliant environments
tagline: Model Serving Foundation Model API pay per token endpoints and batch inference using Databricks hosted models are now available in FIPS compliant environments.
what_it_does: Model Serving Foundation Model API pay per token endpoints and batch inference using Databricks hosted models are now available in FIPS compliant environments. This includes support for the following compliance standards offered through the compliance security profile: FedRAMP Moderate IRAP Canada Protected B See Compliance security profile standards: Foundation Model APIs workloads for region availability of these standards. This article summarizes the limitations and region availability for Databricks Model Serving and supported endpoint types.
why_it_matters: Resource and payload limits Model Serving imposes default limits to ensure reliable performance.

key_takeaway: Model Serving Foundation Model API pay per token endpoints and batch inference using Databricks hosted models are now available in FIPS compliant environments.
